TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Snazi ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 99 buwan, 303 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 249 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 54 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 80%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Snazi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Snazi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Snazi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Snazi hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Snazi hya' ga Qmocyan. tay 'zil na Snazi hya' ga Qoyaw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕnazi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕnazi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕnazi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕnazi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕnazi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕnazi ħjaʔ ɣa qmoʦ~ʨjan. taj ʔzil na s~ɕnazi ħjaʔ ɣa qojaw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Snazi ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 99 buwan, 303 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 249 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 54 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 80%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Snazi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Snazi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Snazi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Snazi hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Snazi hya' ga Qmocyan. tay 'zil na Snazi hya' ga Qoyaw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕnazi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕnazi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕnazi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕnazi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕnazi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕnazi ħjaʔ ɣa qmoʦ~ʨjan. taj ʔzil na s~ɕnazi ħjaʔ ɣa qojaw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
